message:
feat(workflows): add HandleSwarmLearningIndex + CassClient.trigger_index (ft-2l9kn)

Completes the swarm learning cycle: CassClient.trigger_index() refreshes the
cass search index on session.end events. HandleSwarmLearningIndex fires on
session.end/session.summary with 15-min cooldown and full audit trail.
Registered in all workflow runner init points.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
